items.title: Machine Learning (Mitchell)
items.author: Tom M. Mitchell
items.note: Classic textbook; formalizes learning as improvement on task T with experience E measured by P.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Probabilistic view linking models, loss, and learning from data.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter 5 frames classical ML and how learning algorithms fit parameters from datasets.

items.title: scikit-learn User Guide — Supervised learning
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical introduction to training, inference, and evaluation on tabular data.
